refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved through measurement, control, and optimization.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data collection accuracy, control algorithm effectiveness, and optimization results against the target energy_per_ton metric.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve or improve energy efficiency.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.
DP2: Implement adaptive vehicle control algorithms for energy-efficient operation.
DP3: Use data analytics and machine learning for operational optimization.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to address measurement, control, and optimization respectively.

potential_sources: Data dependency between measurement (DP1) and control (DP2).
Feedback loop between control (DP2) and optimization (DP3).
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and managed via well-defined telemetry and control interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable sensor data and network connectivity.
Risk of control algorithm not adapting well to varying conditions.
Optimization effectiveness depends on quality and quantity of operational data.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design to isolate measurement, control, and optimization to reduce complexity and facilitate verification.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration including sensors, control algorithms, and optimization analytics.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for transmitting sensor data and receiving control commands.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational tasks and parameters for optimization.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts if energy efficiency control conflicts with safety constraints.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between modules and external systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as it integrates all energy efficiency functions; low diffusion risk.
Contains vehicle control but limited scope for optimization and measurement integration.
Primarily for remote control; less relevant for energy efficiency functions.
Interfaces for safety alerts but not core to energy efficiency implementation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing energy efficiency functions within NGHE Solution module minimizes interface complexity and diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple functions.
Risk of delayed updates if optimization algorithms require frequent tuning.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution to separate measurement, control, and optimization for maintainability.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FRs are clearly refined and mapped to logical DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
Potential interface overload on Telemetry and Network Link.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the primary module, reducing diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data analysis and operational testing within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine internal modularization of NGHE Solution to improve maintainability.
Validate telemetry interface capacity to handle data volume.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and mapping meets requirements with acceptable risks and clear module boundaries.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve or improve energy efficiency.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sufficient computational resources within NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Performance data from sensor and telemetry systems.
Validation of control and optimization algorithms in operational scenarios.
